title: sida canacorum
intro: Sida canacorum, also known as the "canacorum mallow," is a plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is commonly found in tropical regions of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sida canacorum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in the management of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and salves, and its roots are sometimes used to make a medicinal paste.
